items.name: Occupancy Rate
items.method: Occupied Units / Total Units

items.name: Average Vacant Days
items.method: Sum of vacant days across all units that were vacant in period / count of those units

items.name: Aged Vacancy
items.method: (Count of units vacant > 60 days / Total units) × 100

sub_items.name: Avg Review Score
sub_items.method: Volume-weighted average across all platforms (Google, Yelp, Apartments.com, ApartmentRatings, Facebook)

sub_items.name: Review Volume
sub_items.method: Total review count across all tracked platforms

sub_items.name: Review Recency (last 90d)
sub_items.method: Count of reviews posted in last 90 days across all platforms

sub_items.name: Platform Coverage
sub_items.method: Count of platforms where property has a profile with reviews

sub_items.name: GMB Claimed
sub_items.method: Check Google Business Profile — is it claimed by the property?

sub_items.name: GMB Optimized
sub_items.method: GMB has complete info: hours, photos, description, categories, services

sub_items.name: Social - Facebook
sub_items.method: Property has an active Facebook page

sub_items.name: Social - Instagram
sub_items.method: Property has an active Instagram account

sub_items.name: Social - TikTok
sub_items.method: Property has an active TikTok account

sub_items.name: Social - LinkedIn
sub_items.method: Property has a LinkedIn company page

sub_items.name: Audience Size
sub_items.method: Total followers/likes across all active social platforms

sub_items.name: Post Consistency
sub_items.method: Average posts per week across active platforms (sample last 30 days)

sub_items.name: Website Exists
sub_items.method: Property has a dedicated website (not just an ILS listing)

sub_items.name: Mobile Responsive
sub_items.method: Website renders correctly on mobile device

sub_items.name: Live Chat
sub_items.method: Website has live chat or chatbot functionality

sub_items.name: Contact Form
sub_items.method: Website has a working contact/inquiry form

sub_items.name: Floor Plans
sub_items.method: Floor plan images or diagrams available on website

sub_items.name: Photo Gallery
sub_items.method: Website has a photo gallery section

sub_items.name: Unit Availability
sub_items.method: Website shows current available units with pricing

sub_items.name: Virtual Tours
sub_items.method: Website offers virtual tour / 3D walkthrough of units

sub_items.name: Social Media Paid Ads
sub_items.method: Property runs paid social media advertising campaigns

sub_items.name: Google Adwords
sub_items.method: Property runs Google Ads / PPC campaigns

sub_items.name: Email/SMS Marketing
sub_items.method: Property has email or SMS marketing campaigns for prospects/residents

sub_items.name: Referral Program Exists
sub_items.method: Formal resident referral program in place

sub_items.name: Referral Incentive Offered
sub_items.method: Monetary or other incentive offered for successful referrals

sub_items.name: Referral Tracking System
sub_items.method: System exists to track referral sources and outcomes

sub_items.name: Local Business Partnerships
sub_items.method: Partnerships with local businesses for cross-promotion

sub_items.name: Influencer/Creator Collaborations
sub_items.method: Collaborations with social media influencers or content creators

sub_items.name: Co-Branded Content or Events
sub_items.method: Joint content or events with partner organizations

sub_items.name: Corp Relocation Program Exists
sub_items.method: Formal corporate relocation program in place

sub_items.name: RMC Partnerships
sub_items.method: Active partnerships with Relocation Management Companies

sub_items.name: Corporate Rates/Packages
sub_items.method: Special rates or packages for corporate relocations

sub_items.name: Furnished/Short-Term Options
sub_items.method: Furnished or short-term lease options available for relocations

sub_items.name: Dedicated Relocation Contact
sub_items.method: Named point of contact for relocation inquiries

sub_items.name: Broker Program Exists
sub_items.method: Formal broker/locator program in place

sub_items.name: Broker Portal
sub_items.method: Online portal for brokers to check availability and submit clients

sub_items.name: Broker Materials
sub_items.method: Marketing materials specifically for brokers/locators

sub_items.name: Direct Broker Contact
sub_items.method: Named direct contact for broker inquiries

sub_items.name: Broker Lead Tracking
sub_items.method: System to track broker-referred leads and conversions

sub_items.name: Broker Events/Outreach
sub_items.method: Events or outreach specifically targeting brokers/locators

items.name: Cost per Lead
items.method: Total marketing spend (trailing 12 months) / total leads generated in same period. Marketing spend includes paid advertising + platform subscriptions + listing fees + monthly service costs.

areas.name: Leasing Performance
areas.question: Is the team converting demand into leases?

sub_items.name: Lead-to-Tour %
sub_items.method: Tours scheduled / total leads received

sub_items.name: Tour-to-App %
sub_items.method: Applications submitted / tours completed

sub_items.name: App-to-Lease %
sub_items.method: Leases signed / applications submitted

sub_items.name: Tour-to-Lease %
sub_items.method: Leases signed / tours completed

sub_items.name: Lead-to-Lease %
sub_items.method: Leases signed / total leads received

sub_items.name: Cancel Rate
sub_items.method: Scheduled tours cancelled by prospect before appointment / total scheduled tours

sub_items.name: Ghost Rate
sub_items.method: Scheduled tours where prospect did not show and did not cancel / total scheduled tours (excludes cancellations)

sub_items.name: Follow-Up: Contact Received
sub_items.method: Secret shopper — did follow-up occur?

sub_items.method: Secret shopper — was follow-up personalized?

sub_items.name: Follow-Up: Referenced Visit Details
sub_items.method: Secret shopper — did follow-up reference the visit?

sub_items.name: Follow-Up: Made Another Close Attempt
sub_items.method: Secret shopper — did follow-up include close attempt?

sub_items.name: Email Response Time
sub_items.method: Send test email inquiry, measure response time

sub_items.name: Phone Response Time
sub_items.method: Place test call, measure callback time if not answered

sub_items.name: Follow-Up System
sub_items.method: Is follow-up documented and/or automated?

sub_items.name: Follow-Up Volume
sub_items.method: How many follow-up touches in the nurture sequence?

sub_items.name: After-Hours Handling
sub_items.method: Call after hours — what happens?

sub_items.name: Weekend Handling
sub_items.method: Call/visit on weekend — what's available?

sub_items.name: Advanced Programs
sub_items.method: Nurture drip and/or re-engagement campaigns in place?

sub_items.name: Expectations Communicated
sub_items.method: Leasing process expectations set with applicants upfront

sub_items.name: Online Application Available
sub_items.method: Application can be completed online

sub_items.name: Mobile-Friendly Application
sub_items.method: Application works on mobile device

sub_items.name: Application Status Communication
sub_items.method: Applicants notified of status updates during processing

sub_items.name: Credit Check Performed
sub_items.method: Credit check is part of screening

sub_items.name: Background Check Performed
sub_items.method: Criminal background check is part of screening

sub_items.name: Income Verification Performed
sub_items.method: Income verification is part of screening

sub_items.name: Rental History Verification
sub_items.method: Prior landlord references checked

sub_items.name: Employment Verification
sub_items.method: Employment verified during screening

sub_items.name: Electronic Lease Signing
sub_items.method: Leases can be signed electronically

sub_items.name: Clear Move-In Cost Breakdown
sub_items.method: Itemized move-in costs provided to applicant

sub_items.name: Deposit/Fee Payment Online
sub_items.method: Deposits and fees can be paid online

sub_items.name: Move-In Date Scheduling Process
sub_items.method: Defined process for scheduling move-in date

sub_items.name: Pre-Move-In Unit Inspection
sub_items.method: Unit inspected before resident move-in

sub_items.name: Move-In Checklist Provided
sub_items.method: Resident receives move-in condition checklist

sub_items.name: Utility Setup Guidance
sub_items.method: Guidance provided for utility transfers/setup

sub_items.name: Key/Access Handoff Process
sub_items.method: Defined process for key/fob/access handoff

sub_items.name: Welcome Package Provided
sub_items.method: New resident welcome package provided

sub_items.name: New Resident Orientation
sub_items.method: In-person or virtual orientation for new residents

sub_items.name: Resident Portal Setup Assistance
sub_items.method: Staff assists new resident with portal/app setup

sub_items.name: Community Rules & Policies Reviewed
sub_items.method: Rules and policies reviewed with new resident

sub_items.name: Emergency Procedures Communicated
sub_items.method: Emergency contacts and procedures provided

sub_items.name: Amenity Walkthrough During Onboarding
sub_items.method: New resident given amenity walkthrough

sub_items.name: App Processing Speed
sub_items.method: Average time from application submission to processing complete

sub_items.name: Screening Processing Speed
sub_items.method: Average time for screening results

sub_items.name: Approval Speed
sub_items.method: Average time from screening to approval decision

sub_items.name: Lease Turnaround
sub_items.method: Average time from approval to executed lease

sub_items.name: Formal Program Exists
sub_items.method: Documented training program exists

sub_items.name: Onboarding Duration
sub_items.method: Length of new hire onboarding program

sub_items.name: Ongoing Frequency
sub_items.method: How often ongoing training occurs

sub_items.name: Coaching Frequency
sub_items.method: How often one-on-one coaching sessions occur

sub_items.name: Certifications Required
sub_items.method: Industry certifications required or encouraged

sub_items.name: Product Knowledge Training
sub_items.method: Training on property features, amenities, neighborhood

sub_items.name: Sales/Closing Training
sub_items.method: Training on sales techniques and closing

sub_items.name: Fair Housing Training
sub_items.method: Fair housing compliance training provided

sub_items.name: CRM/Systems Training
sub_items.method: Training on CRM and other technology systems

sub_items.name: Other Training Programs
sub_items.method: Additional training programs (customer service, conflict resolution, etc.)

sub_items.name: Scheduling Methods
sub_items.method: Count of available scheduling methods (phone, email, online, walk-in)

sub_items.name: Online Self-Booking
sub_items.method: Prospects can self-schedule tours online

sub_items.name: Availability (Weekend/Evening)
sub_items.method: Tours available weekends and/or evenings?

sub_items.name: Broker Scheduling Access
sub_items.method: Brokers can schedule tours directly

sub_items.name: Flexibility (Same-day/Walk-ins)
sub_items.method: Same-day tours and/or walk-ins accepted?

sub_items.name: Accessibility
sub_items.method: Parking availability + signage/wayfinding to leasing office

sub_items.name: Hours Coverage
sub_items.method: Days per week office is open

sub_items.name: Seating Available
sub_items.method: Guest seating in leasing office

sub_items.name: Refreshments
sub_items.method: Water, coffee, or other refreshments offered

sub_items.name: WiFi
sub_items.method: Guest WiFi available in leasing office

sub_items.name: Restroom
sub_items.method: Restroom accessible to prospects

sub_items.name: Professional Setup
sub_items.method: Leasing office has marketing materials + technology setup

sub_items.name: Wayfinding Signage
sub_items.method: Clear signage directing to leasing office from entrance

sub_items.name: Model Available
sub_items.method: Designated model unit available for tours

sub_items.name: Model Quality
sub_items.method: Model unit furnishing and staging level

sub_items.name: Model Positioning
sub_items.method: Does model represent a typical unit or the best-case scenario?

sub_items.name: Platform Count
sub_items.method: Count platforms where property is actively listed

sub_items.name: ILS Coverage
sub_items.method: Presence on Apartments.com and Zillow specifically

sub_items.name: Update Frequency
sub_items.method: How often listings are updated (real-time sync vs manual)

sub_items.name: Management Quality
sub_items.method: Who manages listings (in-house, PM company, external agency)

sub_items.name: Syndication Method
sub_items.method: Centralized feed vs partial vs manual per-platform

sub_items.name: Hero Image Present
sub_items.method: Strong hero/featured image on primary listing

sub_items.name: Exterior Coverage (5+)
sub_items.method: At least 5 exterior photos across listings

sub_items.name: Unit Interior (all rooms/types)
sub_items.method: Interior photos covering all rooms and unit types

sub_items.name: Amenity Coverage
sub_items.method: Percentage of amenities photographed

sub_items.name: Lifestyle Shots (5+)
sub_items.method: At least 5 lifestyle/staging photos

sub_items.name: Professional Photographer
sub_items.method: Photos taken by professional photographer

sub_items.name: Photo Recency
sub_items.method: When were listing photos last updated?

sub_items.name: Unique Selling Points Mentioned
sub_items.method: Listing description highlights property differentiators

sub_items.name: Neighborhood Context Included
sub_items.method: Description mentions neighborhood, nearby amenities, transit

sub_items.name: Call-to-Action Included
sub_items.method: Description includes clear CTA (schedule tour, apply, call)

sub_items.name: Contact Info Clear
sub_items.method: Phone, email, or contact method clearly displayed

sub_items.name: Floor Plans Available
sub_items.method: Floor plan images on listing

sub_items.name: Unit Specs Accurate
sub_items.method: Square footage, bed/bath count accurate

sub_items.name: Amenities Fully Listed
sub_items.method: All community and unit amenities listed

sub_items.name: Pet Policy Stated
sub_items.method: Pet policy clearly stated on listing

sub_items.name: Lease Terms Mentioned
sub_items.method: Available lease terms mentioned

sub_items.name: Pricing Accurate Across Platforms
sub_items.method: Compare pricing on 3+ platforms — consistent?

sub_items.name: Availability Accurate
sub_items.method: Listed availability matches actual availability

sub_items.name: Unit Types/Sizes Correct
sub_items.method: Unit types and square footages match reality

sub_items.name: Amenities List Accurate
sub_items.method: Listed amenities match what's actually available

sub_items.name: Photos Match Property Condition
sub_items.method: Photos accurately represent current property condition

sub_items.name: Specials Updated
sub_items.method: Advertised specials/promotions are current

sub_items.name: Contact Info Current
sub_items.method: Phone numbers, emails, office hours are correct

sub_items.name: Loss-to-Lease %
sub_items.method: (Comp-derived market rent - In-Place Rent) / Comp-derived market rent, across all occupied units. Market rent is established from auditor-collected comp set data, not the property's internal rent matrix.

sub_items.name: New Leases (12mo) — Avg PPSF vs Market Avg PPSF
sub_items.method: Average PPSF of leases signed in last 12 months vs comp set average PPSF

items.name: Concession % of GPR
items.method: Total free rent concession value / Gross Potential Rent. Concessions = free rent only.

items.name: Rent Lift on Turnover
items.method: (New lease rent - previous tenant rent) / previous tenant rent, averaged across all turnovers. Date range: assessment-level variable.

items.name: Net Effective vs Asking Gap
items.method: (Asking Rent - Net Effective Rent) / Asking Rent, averaged across all current leases. Date range: assessment-level variable.

items.name: Renewal Rent Increase
items.method: Average % rent increase on renewed leases. Date range: assessment-level variable.

items.name: Renewal Rate
items.method: Leases renewed / leases expiring in period

items.name: Average Resident Tenure
items.method: Average months of residency across all current residents

items.name: Month-to-Month %
items.method: Units on month-to-month leases / total occupied units

items.name: Controllable Turnover Rate
items.method: Move-outs due to controllable reasons / total units. Controllable: maintenance/condition issues, noise/neighbor complaints, management dissatisfaction, pest issues, safety concerns, rent increase, amenity/service complaints.

items.name: DNR Rate
items.method: Do-Not-Renew notices issued / total expiring leases

sub_items.name: Defined Renewal Process Exists
sub_items.method: Documented renewal process in place

sub_items.name: Renewal Offer Communicated in Writing
sub_items.method: Renewal offers sent in writing (email/letter)

sub_items.name: Renewal Pricing Strategy Defined
sub_items.method: Defined strategy for setting renewal rent increases

sub_items.name: Resident Satisfaction Assessed Before Renewal
sub_items.method: Satisfaction check before renewal offer sent

sub_items.name: Renewal Negotiation Flexibility
sub_items.method: Staff has authority/guidelines to negotiate renewal terms

sub_items.name: Electronic Renewal Signing Available
sub_items.method: Renewals can be signed electronically

sub_items.name: Proactive Retention Outreach Program
sub_items.method: Proactive outreach to residents beyond renewal notices

sub_items.name: Retention Incentives Offered
sub_items.method: Incentives offered to encourage renewal

sub_items.name: Resident Feedback/Survey Program
sub_items.method: Regular satisfaction surveys conducted

sub_items.name: Exit Interview / Move-Out Survey
sub_items.method: Exit interviews or move-out surveys conducted

sub_items.name: DNR Review Process Exists
sub_items.method: Formal review process before issuing DNR

sub_items.name: DNR Criteria Documented
sub_items.method: Written criteria for when to issue DNR

sub_items.name: DNR Decisions Reviewed by Management
sub_items.method: DNR decisions reviewed/approved by management

sub_items.name: DNR Communication Timeline Defined
sub_items.method: Defined timeline for communicating DNR to resident

sub_items.name: Occupied Apartment Program Exists
sub_items.method: Program to show/prepare units before current resident moves out

sub_items.name: Non-Renewal Triggers Showing Communication
sub_items.method: Non-renewal triggers communication to begin showing unit

sub_items.name: Pre-Move-Out Unit Assessment
sub_items.method: Unit assessed before move-out for make-ready planning

sub_items.name: Move-Out Checklist Provided
sub_items.method: Move-out checklist provided to departing resident

sub_items.name: Outreach Timeline
sub_items.method: How many days before lease expiration does renewal outreach begin?

sub_items.name: NTV Response Speed
sub_items.method: How quickly does management respond to a Notice to Vacate?

areas.name: Operations
areas.question: Is the property staffed and equipped to perform?

items.name: Units per Leasing Agent
items.method: Total units / leasing staff FTE

items.name: Units per Maintenance Tech
items.method: Total units / maintenance technician FTE

sub_items.name: Staff Turnover Rate
sub_items.method: Staff departures in trailing 12mo / average headcount

sub_items.name: Average Staff Tenure
sub_items.method: Average months of employment across all current staff

sub_items.name: PM Tenure
sub_items.method: How long current property manager has been in role

sub_items.name: Open Position Rate
sub_items.method: Open/unfilled positions / total budgeted positions

sub_items.name: Coverage Breadth
sub_items.method: Count of technology categories in use

sub_items.name: Capability Depth
sub_items.method: Auditor assesses how fully each system is utilized

sub_items.name: Integration Quality
sub_items.method: Count of system-to-system integrations

sub_items.name: Staff Mobile Access
sub_items.method: Staff can access key systems via mobile devices

sub_items.name: Resident Mobile Access
sub_items.method: Residents have a mobile app for payments, maintenance, etc.

sub_items.name: Automation Level
sub_items.method: Level of workflow automation

sub_items.name: System Efficiency
sub_items.method: Level of system redundancy

sub_items.name: Tech Spend ROI
sub_items.method: Total technology spend / total units

sub_items.name: Fire/Safety Inspection Current
sub_items.method: Most recent fire/safety inspection is current and passed

sub_items.name: No Open Code Violations
sub_items.method: No unresolved code violations on file

sub_items.name: ADA Compliance Met
sub_items.method: Property meets ADA requirements

sub_items.name: Insurance Current
sub_items.method: Property insurance policy is active and current

areas.name: Financials
areas.question: Is the property hitting its financial targets?
areas.scoring_note: All financial items scored against owner's stated budget/targets via variance percentage: (Actual - Budget) / Budget × 100

sub_items.name: Gross Potential Rent
sub_items.method: Actual GPR vs owner's benchmark/budget GPR

sub_items.name: Vacancy Loss
sub_items.method: Actual vacancy loss vs owner's budgeted vacancy loss

sub_items.name: Concessions / Loss-to-Lease
sub_items.method: Actual concession spend vs owner's budget

sub_items.name: Other Income
sub_items.method: Actual other income vs owner's budget

sub_items.name: Effective Gross Income
sub_items.method: Actual EGI vs owner's budgeted EGI

sub_items.name: Payroll & Benefits
sub_items.method: Actual payroll vs budget

sub_items.name: Repairs & Maintenance
sub_items.method: Actual R&M spend vs budget

sub_items.name: Utilities
sub_items.method: Actual utilities vs budget

sub_items.name: Marketing & Advertising
sub_items.method: Actual marketing spend vs budget

sub_items.name: Insurance
sub_items.method: Actual insurance cost vs budget

sub_items.name: Real Estate Taxes
sub_items.method: Actual tax expense vs budget

sub_items.name: Admin / G&A
sub_items.method: Actual G&A vs budget

sub_items.name: Contract Services
sub_items.method: Actual contract services vs budget

sub_items.name: Management Fee
sub_items.method: Actual management fee vs budget/contract

sub_items.name: Total Operating Expenses
sub_items.method: Actual total OpEx vs budget

sub_items.name: Net Operating Income
sub_items.method: Actual NOI vs owner's budgeted NOI

sub_items.name: Capital Expenditures
sub_items.method: Actual CapEx vs budgeted CapEx

sub_items.name: Capital Reserves
sub_items.method: Current reserve balance vs target reserve balance

areas.name: Maintenance & Turnovers
areas.question: Are units maintained and turned efficiently?

sub_items.name: Emergency Response Time
sub_items.method: Average time from emergency work order submission to first response

sub_items.name: Routine Response Time
sub_items.method: Average time from routine work order submission to first response

sub_items.name: Work Order Completion Rate
sub_items.method: Completed work orders / total work orders submitted in period

sub_items.name: Avg Work Order Completion Duration
sub_items.method: Average days from work order submission to completion

sub_items.name: Callback / Repeat Work Order Rate
sub_items.method: Work orders for same issue code in same unit recurring within the lease term / total completed work orders.

sub_items.name: Preventive vs Reactive Ratio
sub_items.method: Preventive/scheduled work orders / total work orders

sub_items.name: Formal Request System
sub_items.method: Structured work order system exists

sub_items.name: Maintenance Process Documentation
sub_items.method: Written SOPs for maintenance processes

sub_items.name: Parts Inventory System
sub_items.method: Common parts stocked on-site with tracking system

sub_items.name: Make-Ready Duration
sub_items.method: Average days from move-out to unit listed as market-ready

sub_items.name: Make-Ready Cost
sub_items.method: Average direct cost per unit turnover (labor + materials + vendor invoices). Excludes overhead and staff time.

areas.name: Property Condition
areas.question: What shape is the asset in?

sub_items.name: Overall Condition Rating
sub_items.method: Auditor's overall assessment of property physical condition

sub_items.name: Common Areas Rating
sub_items.method: Condition of lobbies, hallways, stairwells, laundry rooms

sub_items.name: Exterior Presentation
sub_items.method: Grounds, parking, signage, lighting, landscaping, facades

sub_items.name: Amenities Condition Rating
sub_items.method: Condition of pool, gym, clubhouse, dog park, playgrounds, business center

sub_items.name: Issues Count
sub_items.method: Count of observable physical issues during site walk

sub_items.name: Roof
sub_items.method: Visual inspection + management-reported age and last service date

sub_items.name: HVAC Systems
sub_items.method: System age, performance complaints, last service date

sub_items.name: Plumbing
sub_items.method: Pipe material, visible leaks, water pressure test, reported issues

sub_items.name: Electrical
sub_items.method: Panel condition, wiring age, capacity concerns

sub_items.name: Siding / Facade
sub_items.method: Visual inspection of exterior walls, siding, brick condition

sub_items.name: Windows
sub_items.method: Seal integrity, condensation, operability, age

sub_items.name: Parking Surfaces
sub_items.method: Lot/garage condition, striping, drainage, cracking

sub_items.name: Elevators
sub_items.method: Condition, inspection currency, reported issues. N/A if no elevators

sub_items.name: Water Heaters
sub_items.method: Age, type (tank/tankless, individual/central), condition

sub_items.name: Fire/Life Safety Systems
sub_items.method: Sprinklers, alarms, extinguishers, emergency lighting condition

sub_items.name: Number of Deferred Items
sub_items.method: Count of distinct deferred maintenance items identified during site walk

sub_items.name: Critical Systems Affected
sub_items.method: Any deferred items on major systems (roof, HVAC, plumbing, electrical, structural)?

sub_items.name: Safety Hazards Present
sub_items.method: Any deferred items creating safety risks?

sub_items.name: Flooring
sub_items.method: Average rating across all sampled vacant units

sub_items.name: Walls / Paint
sub_items.method: Average rating across all sampled vacant units

sub_items.name: Kitchen Cabinets & Countertops
sub_items.method: Average rating across all sampled vacant units

sub_items.name: Kitchen Appliances
sub_items.method: Average rating across all sampled vacant units

sub_items.name: Bathroom Fixtures & Tile
sub_items.method: Average rating across all sampled vacant units

sub_items.name: Windows & Blinds
sub_items.method: Average rating across all sampled vacant units

sub_items.name: Doors & Hardware
sub_items.method: Average rating across all sampled vacant units

sub_items.name: Lighting Fixtures
sub_items.method: Average rating across all sampled vacant units

sub_items.name: HVAC (in-unit)
sub_items.method: Average rating across all sampled vacant units

sub_items.name: Overall Cleanliness
sub_items.method: Average rating across all sampled vacant units

sub_items.name: General Finish Level
sub_items.method: Average rating across all sampled vacant units

areas.name: Competitive Position
areas.question: How does this property stack up?

sub_items.name: Studio — Avg Price vs Comps
sub_items.method: Subject studio avg rent / comp set studio avg rent

sub_items.name: Studio — PPSF vs Comps
sub_items.method: Subject studio PPSF / comp set studio avg PPSF

sub_items.name: 1-Bed — Avg Price vs Comps
sub_items.method: Subject 1BR avg rent / comp set 1BR avg rent

sub_items.name: 1-Bed — PPSF vs Comps
sub_items.method: Subject 1BR PPSF / comp set 1BR avg PPSF

sub_items.name: 2-Bed — Avg Price vs Comps
sub_items.method: Subject 2BR avg rent / comp set 2BR avg rent

sub_items.name: 2-Bed — PPSF vs Comps
sub_items.method: Subject 2BR PPSF / comp set 2BR avg PPSF

items.name: Amenity Count vs Comps
items.method: Subject amenity count / comp set average amenity count

items.name: Reputation Score vs Comps
items.method: Subject avg review score minus comp set avg review score

items.name: Mystery Shop Score vs Comps
items.method: Subject mystery shop score / comp set avg mystery shop score. All comps mystery-toured with same checklist.

items.name: Occupancy vs Comps
items.method: Subject occupancy rate minus comp set avg occupancy rate

items.name: Resident Services vs Comps
items.method: Subject resident services count / comp set avg resident services count

items.name: Resident Events vs Comps
items.method: Subject events frequency / comp set avg events frequency

items.name: Resident Mobile App vs Comps
items.method: Subject has app (1 or 0) vs comp set adoption rate (% of comps with app)

areas.name: Collections & Screening
areas.question: Is the property screening well and collecting what it's owed?

items.name: Delinquency Rate
items.method: Units with outstanding balance 30+ days past due / total occupied units

items.name: Bad Debt Write-Off Rate
items.method: Total bad debt written off / total rent billed in period

items.name: Eviction Rate
items.method: Eviction filings in period / total occupied units. If assessment date range < 12 months, annualize: (rate / months in period) × 12.

items.name: Application Denial Rate
items.method: Applications denied / total applications received

items.name: Short-Tenure Turnover Rate
items.method: Move-outs before lease term ends / total move-outs. Any early termination regardless of how far into the lease.

sub_items.name: Defined Screening Criteria Documented
sub_items.method: Written screening criteria exist

sub_items.name: Credit Check Required
sub_items.method: Credit check is mandatory for all applicants

sub_items.name: Background Check Required
sub_items.method: Background check is mandatory for all applicants

sub_items.name: Income Verification Required
sub_items.method: Income verification is mandatory

sub_items.name: Rental History Verification Required
sub_items.method: Prior landlord references required

sub_items.name: Employment Verification Required
sub_items.method: Employment verification required

sub_items.name: Consistent Application of Criteria
sub_items.method: Same screening standards applied to all applicants (fair housing)

sub_items.name: Adverse Action Notice Process
sub_items.method: Formal adverse action notice process for denied applicants

A.name: Pricing Proximity
A.description: Bidirectional — deviation from market penalized. |Ratio - 1.0| scored.

B.name: Ratio — Higher is Better
B.description: Subject/comp ratio where values above 1.0 are favorable.

C.name: Point Difference — Higher is Better
C.description: Subject minus comp average. Two calibrations exist (Occupancy: pp, Reputation: points).

D.name: Binary with Adoption Context
D.description: Custom matrix for Resident Mobile App vs Comps. Two-dimensional: subject has/doesn't have app × comp adoption rate.
